rationale: The design requires a modular approach to ensure the CSS variable system is established first, followed by independent component construction to maintain the responsive grid and hover state requirements.

target_workspace_layout.component_hierarchy: App (Layout Wrapper) -> [Header, Hero, ProductGrid -> ProductCard, Footer]

assembly_steps.action: Initialize global CSS variables for colors, spacing, and typography to ensure design system consistency.
Build the structural components (Header, Footer, Hero) with focus on layout positioning and sticky behavior.
Implement the ProductCard with hover-state transitions and the ProductGrid using CSS Grid auto-fit logic.
Assemble the final application structure in App.tsx, integrating all components into the main layout wrapper.
